content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Ninja
description: Legendary Dahl class mod for Zer0 the Assassin, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Backstab, Resurgence, Killing Bl0w, Ambush, F0ll0wthr0ugh. Designed for melee and backstab builds.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC.

special.description: At max level: +52% melee damage, +42% action skill cooldown rate. After a kill with Deception, the next melee strike deals +800% damage.
special.title: In the midst of combat, keep stillness inside of you.
